title: lastrea brackenridgei
intro: Lastrea brackenridgei, also known as the Brackenridge's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with its extracts exhibiting potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
